entry.title: 2023 Chevrolet Silverado 5500HD Work Truck
entry.ns0:dealership_address: N8167 Kellom Rd., Beaver Dam, WI 53916
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2023 Chevrolet Silverado 5500HD Work Truck offered in Summit White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

    Exterior and Appearance

    • Steel wheels are economical and provide proven durability.
    • Steel wheels are economical and provide proven durability.

    Powertrain and Mechanical

    • Diesel direct injection - Crank up the power, cut down the fuel. By injecting fuel directly into the combustion chamber, the fuel mixture combines with the heat of compressed air, causing it to burn rapidly. This increases fuel economy and power while reducing noise for a quieter ride with added oomph, thanks to Diesel direct injection.

    Safety and Security

    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    Other notable features: Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. This 2024 Chevrolet Silverado 5500HD Work Truck offered in SUMMIT WHITE will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

    Exterior and Appearance

    • Steel wheels are economical and provide proven durability.

    Powertrain and Mechanical

    • Diesel direct injection - Crank up the power, cut down the fuel. By injecting fuel directly into the combustion chamber, the fuel mixture combines with the heat of compressed air, causing it to burn rapidly. This increases fuel economy and power while reducing noise for a quieter ride with added oomph, thanks to Diesel direct injection.

    Safety and Security

    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Ignition immobilizer - Theft is a non-starter. You can feel more secure about your vehicle being there when you come back. Ignition immobilizer is a passive security system consisting of a transmitter in the ignition key and a sensor located in the vehicle. If both are not present or do not recognize each other, the vehicle will not start. Ignition immobilizer a sure-fire way to prevent the theft of your vehicle.

entry.title: 2025 Chevrolet Blazer EV AWD RS
entry.ns0:dealership_address: N8167 Kellom Rd., Beaver Dam, WI 53916
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Chevrolet Blazer EV AWD RS offered in Radiant Red Tintcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 3RS

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area.   • Single Speed Transfer Case
  • GMC Pro Safety
  • Cloth Rear Seat with Storage Package
  • SiriusXM with 360L Trial Subscription
  • 2 type-C Charge-Only Rear USB Ports
  • 2 Charge/data USB Ports
  • OnStar Services Capable
  • LED Cargo Area Lighting
  • Steering Wheel Audio Controls
  • 6-Speaker Audio System Feature
  • Theft Deterrent System (unauthorized Entry)
  • HD Rear Vision Camera
  • Front Frame-Mounted Black Recovery Hooks
  • Wi-Fi Hotspot Capable
  • Trailering Package

Sierra Safety Plus Package

  • High Gloss Black Mirror Caps
  • Trailer Camera Provisions
  • Perimeter Lighting
  • Ultrasonic Front and Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Braking
  • Rear Pedestrian Detection
  • Trailer Side Blind Zone Alert
  • HD Surround Vision

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

  • Heated Steering Wheel

Preferred Equipment Group 1SD

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

  • Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.

Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.

When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area.   • Perimeter Lighting
  • Ultrasonic Front and Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Braking
  • Rear Pedestrian Detection
  • Trailer Side Blind Zone Alert
  • HD Surround Vision

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: ENGINE, 6.2L ECOTEC3 V8, ONYX BLACK Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

  • Bed View Camera with Two Trailer Camera Provisions

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

This 2026 Buick Envision Preferred offered in Ebony Twilight Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Comfort and Convenience Package ($1,350 value)

  • Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control Air Conditioning
  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Hands-Free Power Programmable Liftgate
  • Automatic Air Recirculation
  • 3-Channel Programmable Universal Home Remote
  • Air Quality Indicator Sensor

Preferred Equipment Group 1SC

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.     • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Preferred Equipment Group 5SD

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
    • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. This 2026 GMC Sierra 1500 Elevation offered in Onyx Black will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 3VL

  • Power Front Windows with Passenger Express Down
  • Power Rear Windows with Express Down
  • Deep-Tinted Glass
  • Power Door Locks
  • Keyless Open and Start
  • Power Front Windows with Driver Express Up/down
  • Front 40/20/40 Split-Bench Seat
  • Color-Keyed Carpeting Floor Covering
  • Push Button Start
  • Remote Vehicle Starter System
  • Electric Rear-Window Defogger
  • Auto-Locking Rear Differential

  • Wireless Apple CarPlay/wireless Android Auto
  • SiriusXM with 360L Trial Subscription
  • 2 type-C Charge-Only Rear USB Ports
  • 2 Charge/data USB Ports
  • OnStar Services Capable
  • LED Cargo Area Lighting
  • Steering Wheel Audio Controls
  • Theft Deterrent System (unauthorized Entry)
  • HD Rear Vision Camera
  • Front Frame-Mounted Black Recovery Hooks
  • Wi-Fi Hotspot Capable
  • Trailering Package

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

  • EZ-Lift and Lower Tailgate
  • Front LED Fog Lamps
  • 2 Rear USB Ports in Center Console (charge-Only)
  • Rear Pedestrian Alert
  • Premium 7-Speaker Bose Sound System
  • HD Surround Vision
  • Multicolor 6.3" Diagonal Head-Up Display
  • Canyon Safety Plus Package

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL, ENGINE, TURBOMAX, TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED AUTOMATIC, 8L80, REAR AXLE, 3.42 RATIO, WHEELS, 20" X 9" (50.8 CM X 22.9 CM) DIAMOND CUT DARK GREY ALUMINUM, SUMMIT WHITE, SEAT, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK/TEAK, PERFORATED LEATHER-APPOINTED SEAT TRIM, 11.3" DIAGONAL PREMIUM GMC INFOTAINMENT SYSTEM, SUNROOF, POWER INNER SLIDING GLASS, LICENSE PLATE KIT, FRONT, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINER, 1ST AND 2ND ROWS Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. entry.ns0:dealership_address: N8167 Kellom Rd., Beaver Dam, WI 53916
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer LT offered in Sterling Gray Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

LT Cold Weather Package ($595 value)

  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Wrapped Steering Wheel
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Satin Silver and Chrome Wrapped Shift Knob

Convenience Package ($1,495 value)

  • 8-Way Power Driver Seat Adjuster
  • 2-Way Power Driver Lumbar Seat Adjuster
  • Single-Zone Automatic Climate Control
  • Rear Center Armrest
  • Inside Rearview Auto-Dimming Mirror
  • Driver and Front Passenger Illuminated Vanity Mirrors
  • Wireless Charging
  • 120-Volt Power Outlet
  • Power Liftgate
  • 1 type-A and 1 type-C USB Charging-Only Ports

Driver Confidence Package ($395 value)

  • Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert

Preferred Equipment Group 1LT

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.3L I3 TURBO DOHC SIDI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), TRANSMISSION, 9-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.17 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 17" (43.2 CM) HIGH GLOSS BLACK MACHINED ALUMINUM, TIRES, 225/60R17 ALL-SEASON, BLACKWALL, STERLING GRAY METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK, CLOTH SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, 11" DIAGONAL HD COLOR TOUCHSCREEN, AM/FM STEREO., CONVENIENCE PACKAGE, LT COLD WEATHER PACKAGE, DRIVER CONFIDENCE PACKAGE, MECHANICAL JACK WITH TOOLS, TIRE, COMPACT SPARE 16" (40.3 CM), LPO, FRONT AND REAR SPLASH GUARDS, BLACK, LIFTGATE, POWER, LICENSE PLATE BRACKET, FRONT, SEATS, HEATED DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER, SEAT ADJUSTER, DRIVER 8-WAY POWER, SEAT ADJUSTER, DRIVER 2-WAY POWER LUMBAR, POWER OUTLET, 120-VOLT, USB CHARGING-ONLY PORTS, WIRELESS CHARGING, ARMREST, REAR CENTER, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, FRONT AND REAR, STEERING WHEEL, WRAPPED, STEERING WHEEL, HEATED, AIR CONDITIONING, SINGLE-ZONE AUTOMATIC CLIMATE CONTROL, SENSOR, CABIN HUMIDITY, MIRROR, INSIDE REARVIEW AUTO-DIMMING, VISORS, DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER ILLUMINATED VANITY MIRRORS, COVERED, SLIDING, SHIFT KNOB, WRAPPED, SATIN SILVER AND CHROME, REAR PARK ASSIST, REAR CROSS TRAFFIC ALERT, LANE CHANGE ALERT WITH SIDE BLIND ZONE ALERT Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

  • 170 Amp Alternator
  • 5.3L EcoTec3 V8 Engine
  • Electrical Lock Control Steering Column
  • Manual Tilt-Wheel and Telescoping Steering Column

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.title: 2025 Chevrolet Trax LT
entry.ns0:dealership_address: N8167 Kellom Rd., Beaver Dam, WI 53916
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Chevrolet Trax LT offered in Summit White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1LT

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.2L TURBO DOHC DI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), TRANSMISSION, 6-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.50 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 17" (43.2 CM) GRAY-PAINTED MACHINED ALUMINUM, SUMMIT WHITE, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK WITH BLUE ACCENTS, CLOTH/EVOTEX SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, 11" DIAGONAL HD COLOR TOUCHSCREEN, LICENSE PLATE FRONT MOUNTING PACKAGE Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Chevrolet Express Cargo Van RWD 2500 135 offered in Summit White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Chrome Appearance Package ($355 value)

  • Chrome Grille
  • Front and Rear Chrome Bumpers with Step-Pad

Driver Convenience Package ($400 value)

  • Cruise Control
  • Tilt-Wheel

Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

    Powertrain and Mechanical

    • Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same? With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.
    • Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same? With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.

    Safety and Security

    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.
    • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.

The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Dark Appearance Package ($1,580 value)

  • Single Outlet Exhaust
  • Front Frame-Mounted Black Recovery Hooks

Convenience Package II

  • Power Sliding Rear Window with Rear Defogger
  • Hitch Guidance with Hitch View

Leather Package

  • Leather-Appointed Front Seat Trim
  • Up-Level Rear Seat with Storage Package

Protection Package

  • Rear Wheelhouse Liners
  • Chevytec Spray-On Black Bedliner

LT Trail Boss Premium Package ($3,485 value)

    Safety Package

    • Trailer Camera Provisions
    • Perimeter Lighting
    • Ultrasonic Front and Rear Park Assist
    • Rear Cross Traffic Braking
    • Rear Pedestrian Alert
    • Trailer Side Blind Zone Alert
    • HD Surround Vision

    Preferred Equipment Group 2LT

    • SiriusXM with 360L Trial Subscription
    • Rear 60/40 Folding Bench Seat (folds Up)
    • All-Weather Floor Liner
    • Power Front Windows with Passenger Express Down
    • Power Rear Windows with Express Down
    • Deep-Tinted Glass
    • Power Front Windows with Driver Express Up/down
    • Color-Keyed Carpeting Floor Covering
    • Bluetooth For Phone
    • Inside Rearview Mirror with Tilt
    • Heated Power-Adjustable Outside Mirrors
    • High Gloss Black Mirror Caps
    • Auto-Locking Rear Differential
    • Integrated Trailer Brake Controller
    • Electronic Cruise Control
    • 2-Speed Electronic Autotrac Transfer Case
    • Convenience Package
    • Chevy Safety Assist
    • 275/60R20SL AT BW Tires
    • Standard Tailgate
    • EZ Lift Power Lock and Release Tailgate
    • 20" X 9" High Gloss Black Painted Aluminum Wheels
    • Front LED Fog Lamps
    • Teen Driver
    • 12.3" Multicolor Reconfigurable Digital Display
    • OnStar Services Capable
    • Performance Red Recovery Hooks
    • Tire Pressure Monitoring System
    • Steering Wheel Audio Controls
    • 6-Speaker Audio System
    • HD Rear Vision Camera
    • Suspension Package
    • Trailering Package

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, DURAMAX 3.0L TURBO-DIESEL I6, TRANSMISSION, 10-SPEED AUTOMATIC, GVWR, 7200 LBS. (3266 KG), REAR AXLE, 3.23 RATIO, WHEELS, 20" X 9" (50.8 CM X 22.9 CM) HIGH GLOSS BLACK PAINTED ALUMINUM, TIRES, 275/60R20SL ALL-TERRAIN, BLACKWALL, TIRE, SPARE 255/80R17SL ALL-SEASON, BLACKWALL, STERLING GRAY METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK, LEATHER-APPOINTED FRONT OUTBOARD SEATING POSITIONS, AUDIO SYSTEM, CHEVROLET INFOTAINMENT 3 PREMIUM SYSTEM, LT TRAIL BOSS PREMIUM PACKAGE, DARK APPEARANCE PACKAGE, CONVENIENCE PACKAGE II, SAFETY PACKAGE, LEATHER PACKAGE, PROTECTION PACKAGE, ENGINE BLOCK HEATER, SHIFTER, ELECTRONIC TRANSMISSION RANGE SELECTOR, RECOVERY HOOKS, FRONT, FRAME-MOUNTED, BLACK, EXHAUST, DUAL WITH POLISHED OUTLETS, CHEVYTEC SPRAY-ON BEDLINER, BLACK, WHEELHOUSE LINERS, REAR, LPO, MOLDED SPLASH GUARDS, BLACK, LIGHTING, PERIMETER, LICENSE PLATE KIT, FRONT, TAILGATE, MULTI-FLEX, BOSE SOUND SYSTEM, PREMIUM 7-SPEAKER SYSTEM, SEAT, UP-LEVEL REAR WITH STORAGE PACKAGE, CENTER CONSOLE, FLOOR-MOUNTED, WINDOW, POWER, REAR SLIDING, UNIVERSAL HOME REMOTE, WIRELESS CHARGING, USB PORTS, 2, CHARGE/DATA PORTS LOCATED INSIDE CENTER CONSOLE, REAR CROSS TRAFFIC BRAKING, FRONT AND REAR PARK ASSIST, ULTRASONIC, HD SURROUND VISION, TRAILER CAMERA PROVISIONS, HITCH GUIDANCE WITH HITCH VIEW, IN-VEHICLE TRAILERING APP, SYSTEM, TRAILER SIDE BLIND ZONE ALERT, REAR PEDESTRIAN ALERT Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area.     • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Driver Convenience Package ($400 value)

  • Cruise Control

Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

    Powertrain and Mechanical

    • Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same? With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.
    • An OHV (pushrod) engine typically generates low-end torque sooner than an OHC engine of similar size. Peak torque is achieved at a lower RPM in OHV engines than in other designs, providing good acceleration from a stop.

    Safety and Security

    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Chevrolet Trailblazer LT offered in Mosaic Black Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

LT Cold Weather Package ($595 value)

  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Wrapped Steering Wheel
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Satin Silver and Chrome Wrapped Shift Knob

Convenience Package ($1,495 value)

  • 8-Way Power Driver Seat Adjuster
  • 2-Way Power Driver Lumbar Seat Adjuster
  • Single-Zone Automatic Climate Control
  • Rear Center Armrest
  • Inside Rearview Auto-Dimming Mirror
  • Driver and Front Passenger Illuminated Vanity Mirrors
  • Wireless Charging
  • 120-Volt Power Outlet
  • Power Liftgate
  • 1 type-A and 1 type-C USB Charging-Only Ports

Driver Confidence Package ($395 value)

  • Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert

Preferred Equipment Group 1LT

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.3L I3 TURBO DOHC SIDI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), TRANSMISSION, 9-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.17 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 17" (43.2 CM) HIGH GLOSS BLACK MACHINED ALUMINUM, TIRES, 225/60R17 ALL-SEASON, BLACKWALL, MOSAIC BLACK METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK, CLOTH SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, 11" DIAGONAL HD COLOR TOUCHSCREEN, AM/FM STEREO., CONVENIENCE PACKAGE, LT COLD WEATHER PACKAGE, DRIVER CONFIDENCE PACKAGE, MECHANICAL JACK WITH TOOLS, TIRE, COMPACT SPARE 16" (40.3 CM), LPO, FRONT AND REAR SPLASH GUARDS, BLACK, LIFTGATE, POWER, LICENSE PLATE BRACKET, FRONT, SEATS, HEATED DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER, SEAT ADJUSTER, DRIVER 8-WAY POWER, SEAT ADJUSTER, DRIVER 2-WAY POWER LUMBAR, POWER OUTLET, 120-VOLT, USB CHARGING-ONLY PORTS, WIRELESS CHARGING, ARMREST, REAR CENTER, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, FRONT AND REAR, STEERING WHEEL, WRAPPED, STEERING WHEEL, HEATED, AIR CONDITIONING, SINGLE-ZONE AUTOMATIC CLIMATE CONTROL, SENSOR, CABIN HUMIDITY, MIRROR, INSIDE REARVIEW AUTO-DIMMING, VISORS, DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER ILLUMINATED VANITY MIRRORS, COVERED, SLIDING, SHIFT KNOB, WRAPPED, SATIN SILVER AND CHROME, REAR PARK ASSIST, REAR CROSS TRAFFIC ALERT, LANE CHANGE ALERT WITH SIDE BLIND ZONE ALERT Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 GMC Terrain AWD Elevation offered in Ebony Twilight Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Elevation Premium Package ($2,850 value)

  • CoreTec Seat Trim
  • 19" Technical Gray Machine-Face Aluminum Wheels

Convenience Package II

  • 8-Way Power Driver Seat Adjuster
  • 2-Way Power Driver Lumbar Seat Adjuster
  • Cabin Humidity and Windshield Temperature Sensor
  • Front Intermittent RainSense Wipers
  • Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control
  • Heated Wiper Park
  • Wireless Phone Charging For Portable Devices
  • Autosense Hands-Free Programmable Power Liftgate
  • 3-Channel Programmable Universal Home Remote
  • Brushed Aluminum Roof Rails
  • Overhead Sunglass Storage

Preferred Equipment Group 3SB

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: ENGINE, 1.5L TURBO DOHC 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, VVT, TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED AUTOMATIC, ELECTRONICALLY-CONTROLLED WITH OVERDRIVE, AXLE, 3.47 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 19" (48.3 CM) TECHNICAL GRAY, MACHINED-FACE ALUMINUM, TIRES, 235/55R19, ALL-SEASON BLACKWALL, EBONY TWILIGHT METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, AFTER DARK, CORETEC SEAT TRIM, ELEVATION PREMIUM PACKAGE, CONVENIENCE PACKAGE III, TECHNOLOGY PACKAGE II, CONVENIENCE PACKAGE II, MEMORY PACKAGE, ROOF RAILS, LPO, FRONT AND REAR SPLASH GUARDS, MOLDED, FOG LAMPS, FRONT, LED, WIPERS, RAINSENSE, HEATED WIPER PARK, REAR CAMERA MIRROR WASHER, LICENSE PLATE FRONT MOUNTING PACKAGE, LIFTGATE, AUTOSENSE, HANDS-FREE POWER PROGRAMMABLE, WIRELESS PHONE CHARGING, SEAT ADJUSTER, DRIVER 8-WAY POWER, SEAT ADJUSTER, PASSENGER 8-WAY POWER, SEATS, HEATED, REAR OUTBOARD SEATS, SEAT ADJUSTER, 2-WAY POWER DRIVER LUMBAR CONTROL, SEAT ADJUSTER, FRONT PASSENGER 2-WAY POWER LUMBAR, SEAT, VENTILATED DRIVER, SEAT, VENTILATED FRONT PASSENGER, LPO, ALL-WEATHER FLOOR LINERS, FRONT ONLY, LPO, SECOND ROW ALL-WEATHER MAT, UNIVERSAL HOME REMOTE, AIR CONDITIONING, DUAL-ZONE AUTOMATIC CLIMATE CONTROL, SENSOR, CABIN HUMIDITY AND WINDSHIELD TEMPERATURE, REAR CAMERA MIRROR, SUNGLASS STORAGE, OVERHEAD, HD SURROUND VISION, REAR PEDESTRIAN ALERT, TRAFFIC SIGN RECOGNITION Napleton Beaver Dam Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area.   • 2 type-C Charge-Only Rear USB Ports
  • 2 Charge/data USB Ports

  • HD Rear Vision Camera
  • Front Frame-Mounted Black Recovery Hooks
  • Wi-Fi Hotspot Capable
  • Trailering Package

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped.   • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.                 • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.   • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them.   • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Chevrolet Trax 2RS offered in Apex Red will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Driver Confidence Package ($795 value)

  • Adaptive Cruise Control
  • Rear Park Assist
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert

Preferred Equipment Group 2RS

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

  • HD Surround Vision
  • Wi-Fi Hotspot Capable
  • Off-Road Suspension
  • Trailering Package

AT4 Preferred Package

  • Power Sliding Rear Window with Rear Defogger
  • Universal Home Remote

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

With 8-way driver seat, finding the perfect position is easy, so you can sit back, (or up, or a little forward), relax and enjoy the journey.
          • Front passenger seat with 4-way directional controls

          Convenience

          • Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.

          Technology and Telematics

          • Wireless connectivity - Strike the cord. Wireless technology makes it easy to place calls without having to fumble with your phone. It integrates your device with the system inside your vehicle for hands-free access. Keep connected and keep your hands on the wheel with wireless connectivity.
